title: Portuguese Stew with Smoky Rich Flavor
description: A hearty, rich stew with smoky flavors, made with tender beef and liver, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the beef stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the liver and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the tomatoes, beef broth, Portuguese spices, and smoked paprika.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
Season the stew with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme.
